title: Tutor progress state (offline Fusha runtime)
description: Machine learner state for tools/fusha_tutor_runtime.py. Replaces the markdown progress template with a replayable JSON state. PRIVATE by nature: a real learner's file lives OUTSIDE the repo and is never committed; only the schema + the canonical empty template ship. Deterministic: now_day is an explicit integer day index, never a wall clock. The runtime writes this only when --write is passed.

learner_label.description: An opaque session label; never PII.

now_day.description: Explicit day index (caller-supplied; no wall clock).

items.description: Per-checkpoint scheduling state, keyed by checkpoint id.

cleared_item_ids.description: Items that have reached a full pass at least once.

missed.description: Open misses awaiting remediation (mirrors the missed-error log).

error_reason.description: A pending-reason code (homograph_haraka, pos_mismatch, ...) or null.
